name: source-folder closed-loop step profile-extends activates the new rule via per-source extends in a profile
command:
mkdir -p profiles generated-code-quality-standards/google && printf 'source:
  id: google-new
  authoritative_publisher: google
  authoritative_url: x
  registry_link: x
  fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:abc
rules:
  - id: g-google-new-1
    detector: x
    recommended: true
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/google-new.yaml && printf 'extends: [google:google-new]
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step profile-extends --profile profiles/p.yaml --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rule=g-google-new-1' out.txt && grep -q 'active=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
